description: Refactor remaining pilots (SocialPilot, ContentPilot, SchedulePilot, ShoppingPilot, TravelPilot, LearningPilot) to extend IntelligentAgent. Implement agent handoff capability where one agent can invoke another via tool registry.
steps: Refactor packages/agent-runtime/src/agents/social-pilot.ts to extend IntelligentAgent. Register tools: 'social.compose_post', 'social.schedule_post', 'social.analyze_engagement'. Use AI for content generation instead of templates.
Refactor packages/agent-runtime/src/agents/content-pilot.ts to extend IntelligentAgent. Register tools: 'content.draft', 'content.edit', 'content.seo_optimize'. Use AI for content creation.

Refactor packages/agent-runtime/src/agents/schedule-pilot.ts to extend IntelligentAgent. Register tools: 'schedule.find_slot', 'schedule.book', 'schedule.reschedule', 'schedule.conflict_check'. Use AI for smart scheduling.

Refactor packages/agent-runtime/src/agents/shopping-pilot.ts to extend IntelligentAgent. Register tools: 'shopping.search', 'shopping.compare', 'shopping.add_to_cart'. Use AI for product recommendations.
Refactor packages/agent-runtime/src/agents/travel-pilot.ts to extend IntelligentAgent. Register tools: 'travel.plan_trip', 'travel.find_flights', 'travel.book_hotel'. Use AI for itinerary planning.

Refactor packages/agent-runtime/src/agents/learning-pilot.ts to extend IntelligentAgent. Register tools: 'learning.find_resources', 'learning.create_path', 'learning.quiz'. Use AI for adaptive learning paths.

Add agent handoff capability to IntelligentAgent: register a meta-tool 'agent.handoff' in the base class that allows one agent to invoke another agent's tools via the orchestrator. The tool takes {targetAgentId, toolName, args} and delegates.
Update tests for all six pilots to use mocked AI engine. Add a test for agent handoff: email-pilot hands off to schedule-pilot for booking.
acceptance_criteria: All 12 pilots now extend IntelligentAgent (none use WorkerAgent directly)
Each pilot registers domain-specific tools in TypedToolRegistry
Agent handoff tool ('agent.handoff') is available in all agents
All pilot tests pass with mocked AI engine
No pilot contains hardcoded rule-based logic for its core function
findings: All 369 tests pass (41 test files). Typecheck and lint clean. All 6 remaining pilots refactored to extend IntelligentAgent with AI-driven logic. Agent handoff meta-tool registered in base class, available to all agents. Pre-commit prettier reformatted files. Commit message kept under 100 chars.
